title: These 2 Consumer Staples Stocks Could Beat Earnings: Why They Should Be on Your Radar
text: Finding stocks expected to beat quarterly earnings estimates becomes an easier task with our Zacks Earnings ESP.

title: July Dividend Kings: 5 Buys, 4 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive-years."--Dogs of the Dow. The 50 Dividend Kings screened as of June 27, 2023, represented nine of eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker targeted-top-ten net-gainers ranged 20.35%-40.04% topped-by ABM Industries, and Gorman-Rupp. By yield, MO tops-all. Top-ten Kingly July yields from NFG, BKH, ABBV, NWN, FRT, CDUAF, MMM, UVV, LEG, & MO averaged 5.4%.

title: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Archer Daniels Midland Company (ADM) is a Trending Stock
text: Zacks.com users have recently been watching ADM (ADM) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.

title: 500 Top Dividend Dogs
text: The June/July 2023 edition of Fortune Magazine revealed 500 biggest U.S. companies by revenue. To sniff out the best dividend buys, I focused on 68 industry leaders using YCharts 6/22/23 data. Those 68 industry leaders were segmented into 21 business sectors ranging (alphabetically) from apparel to transportation. 58 dividend yielding stocks highlighted those 68 industry leaders and ranged 0.17% to 9.71% in annual yield and ranged -48.62% to 44.50% in broker-estimated one-year price-target-upsides by YCharts 6/22/23 reckoning.

title: 5 Broker-Friendly Stocks to Monitor in the Current Scenario
text: We believe that investors should keep a close watch on broker-favorite stocks like American Airlines (AAL), Bread Financial (BFH), ABM Industries (ABM), Cleveland-Cliffs (CLF) and Archer Daniels (ADM).

text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ADM (NYSE: ADM), a global leader in human and animal nutrition, released today its outlook on what's driving the advancement of the protein ecosystem. title: 4 Agriculture Operations Stocks to Watch in a Distressed Industry
text: Agriculture - Operations industry's near-term prospects look clouded due to impacts of raw material and commodity price inflation, along with tight supply conditions. However, companies like ADM, CTVA, AGRO and LMNR are poised to gain on solid product portfolios and innovation.

title: 7 Undervalued S&P 500 Stocks to Buy in June
text: When attempting to build a portfolio of reliable entities, you probably can't go wrong with undervalued S&P 500 stocks. Featuring the market performance of 500 of the largest companies listed on stock exchanges in the U.S., you're dealing with proven winners.

title: Archer Daniels Midland Company (ADM) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
text: Recently, Zacks.com users have been paying close attention to ADM (ADM). This makes it worthwhile to examine what the stock has in store.

title: Archer-Daniels-Midland Or Bunge Limited? Choosing Between The Two
text: In this article, I provide a comparative analysis of Archer-Daniels-Midland and Bunge Limited to pick the ultimate agribusiness leader. ADM's business looks more stable and higher margin at first glance. However, this dominance of the "paper profit" of ADM continues until we turn to the cash flow statements. In terms of liquidity, BG seems a much more stable company at the moment. If the merger with Viterra goes through, I expect an enormous increase in shareholders' value.

title: Can Growth Strategies Aid Archer Daniels (ADM) Amid Cost Woes?
text: Progress on strategic initiatives, supported by the Readiness program, is likely to aid Archer Daniels (ADM) amid inflation, higher SG&A expenses and the Nutrition segment's weakness.

title: ADM Announces Appointment of Nuria Miquel as Chief Science Officer
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ADM (NYSE: ADM), a global leader in innovative solutions from nature, today announced the appointment of Dr. Nuria Miquel as senior vice president and chief science officer, effective August 1. “Innovation is a foundation of ADM's culture and strategy, and I am proud to ask Nuria to lead our efforts as we expand the horizons of food, fuel, feed, and industrial and consumer products made from nature,” said ADM Chief Executive Officer Juan Luciano. “Throughout her distin.

title: 5 Relatively Safe And Cheap Dividend Stocks To Invest In - June 2023
text: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight five companies that are large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying and are offering large discounts to their historical norms. We go over our filtering process to select just five conservative DGI stocks from more than 7,500 companies that are traded on U.S. exchanges, including OTC networks. In addition to the primary list that yields just under 3%, we present two other groups of five DGI stocks each, with the goal of moderate to high yields.

title: Dividend Stock Watch List: Lanny's June 2023 Edition
text: United Parcel Service and Archer-Daniels-Midland are two dividend stocks to watch in June 2023. UPS has a dividend yield of 3.78%, while ADM offers a yield of 2.45% and has a 48-year history of growing dividends. Other dividend stocks to consider include CVS Pharmacy, LyondellBasell, and Johnson & Johnson.

title: Archer-Daniels-Midland Is A Hold, But It Becomes Interesting
text: Archer-Daniels-Midland is a dividend growth company with solid fundamentals and attractive valuation, but faces risks such as competition and cyclicality. The company has growth opportunities in diversification, a strong balance sheet, and the alternative proteins market. Due to medium-term stagnation risks and uncertainty, the company is considered a Hold, with a more attractive entry point at a P/E ratio of 8-9 during a market pullback.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy in June 2023
text: While acquiring high-momentum shares in the hopes of even greater returns may represent a sound tactic, arguably most investors prefer targeting the most undervalued stocks to buy. At the psychological level, a certain pioneering appeal exists about discovering the next big thing before the crowd arrives.

title: The 3 Best Biofuel Stocks to Buy Now
text: In April of this year, OPEC announced surprise oil production cuts to maintain higher prices, which had fallen since the pandemic's end. With oil prices being supported in this way, some have called on biofuels to fill the gap.
